critical_finding: The 5 GRETIL witnesses are ALL commentaries citing the same base text. They are NOT independent textual witnesses. Only 1 independent samhita base on disk (GRETIL verse text). The 518 textual variants from prior collation are commentary-citation differences, NOT genuine textual variants.

witnesses_acquired.name: GRETIL verse text (base)
witnesses_acquired.notes: Extracted from 5 GRETIL commentaries; all contain the same verse text.

witnesses_acquired.name: Gita Press Tattva Vivecana (OCR)
witnesses_acquired.notes: Genuinely independent typesetting. OCR quality moderate.

quality_gate: EVIDENCE INCOMPLETE - need >=1 more independent saṃhitā base
prior_collation_correction: The 518 textual variants reported in collation_summary_v3.json are NOT genuine textual variants - they are commentary citation differences. The Gita verse text is stable across all5 GRETIL commentaries.
